name: Orga Nanagear
description: __Race:__ Human    __Affiliation:__ Sabertooth  __Occupation:__ Mage  __Team:__ Team Sabertooth  __Base of Operations:__ Sabertooth Guild  __Magic:__ Black Lightning Magic  __Manga Debut:__ Chapter 268  Orga Nanagear (オルガ・ナナギア Oruga Nanagia) is a Mage of the current strongest Guild in Fiore, Sabertooth.  Orga seems to be one of the quietest members of his team, rarely ever talking or changing his usual, neutral expression, not even on the battlefield, when confronted with an opponent. In such cases, his demeanor appears to remain the same, with him striking the foe down with no seeming transport or emotion.  (Source: Fairy Tail Wikia)
